item.title: Kastom Giraun: Celebrating the importance of customary land
item.description: [Act Now PNG] Kastom Giraun: New book and website celebrate the importance of customary land

item.title: Bougainville News Alert : Statement from the Office of the President: Response to Chief John L Momis, GCL, former President of Bougainville
item.description: [Bougainville News] It is disappointing to see a leader of John Momis’ stature, a former two term President of Bougainville and longtime Regional Member for Bougainville trying to undermine the good work of the Autonomous Bougainville Government. See Momis Press Release Part … Continue reading →

item.description: [Education News PNG] APIA, SAMOA – 16 February 2026 – The Pacific Academy of Sciences (PAS) today announced two historic milestones for Pacific research and innovation at its The post Pacific Academy Unveils AI-Powered Research Platform first appeared on Education News PNG .

item.title: Inflation Ticks Up as Australians Wait for May Budget
item.description: [Inside PNG] Rising inflation in January has put the Australian Federal Budget and interest rates in the spotlight as housing and food costs drive underlying prices to 3.4%. The post Inflation Ticks Up as Australians Wait for May Budget first appeared on Inside PNG . The post Inflation Ticks Up as Australians Wa

item.title: PNG Hekari FC Claim Historic First Win in OFC Pro League
item.description: [One Papua New Guinea] Papua New Guinea champions PNG Hekari FC have etched their name into the record books after securing their first-ever win in the OFC Pro League with a hard-fought 3-1 triumph over Vanuatu United. The result marks a major milestone for the PNG club, which had been searching for a breakthrough victory

item.title: How Governments Are Formed After Elections
item.description: [Pawa TV] Papua New Guinea is a parliamentary democracy where the National Parliament comprises 111 elected members. Election processes lead to coalition negotiations, followed by the election of a Prime Minister and Cabinet formation. The post How Governments Are Formed After Elections first appeared on PAWA

item.title: PNG Former Defence Chiefs Call for Neutrality Statement on Global Conflict
item.description: [PNG Facts] A clear public declaration from the Government of Papua New Guinea on the country’s neutrality has been requested by former commanders of the Papua New Guinea Defence Force following rising tensions between the United States, Israel and Iran. Retired Major General Jerry Singirok and retired Commodor

item.title: Court orders Walter Schnaubelt to vacate New Ireland Governor’s Office
item.description: [Post Courier] The National Court has ordered the Member for Namatanai, Walter Schnaubelt, to immediately vacate the Office of the Provincial Governor of New Ireland Province and restrained him from exercising any powers in that role, paving the way for Byron Chan to assume the governorship. Justice Pauline Bre de

item.title: PM Marape Highlights Highlands Highway as Backbone of PNG Economy During Opening Of 35 New Bridges
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] PRIME Minister James Marape has described the Highlands Highway as the backbone of Papua New Guinea’s economy, announcing continued major government investment in roads, bridges, power infrastructure and economic development along the country’s most important transport corridor. Speaking during the

item.title: PM Marape pledges Parliamentary Seat for Women’s Council President if Pangu returns to power
item.description: [The PNG Sun] Prime Minister James Marape this morning announced that the President of the National Council of Women will be appointed as one of the three nominated Members of Parliament under the Constitution if the ruling Pangu Pati returns to power after the 2027 Papua New Guinea National General Election. Spe

item.title: Gavman Minista bam long kar long haiwe
item.description: [Wantok Niuspepa] Minista bilong 'Energy' na Memba bilong Kairuku, Peter Namea Isoaimo i bin bam long kar long 2nd Februeri, 2026 long Hiritano Haiwe. Em i bam long kar wantaim wanpela soldia bilong PNG Defence Force (PNGDF). Ol kar bilong tupela man i stap nau long polis stesin long 15 Mile na wok painimaut i gohet

item.title: PNGFA’s weak response to log export transparency call
item.description: [Act Now PNG] PNGFA has responded weakly to ACT NOW's call for transparency on log export data

item.title: Bougainville News Alert : A Nation In His Making – A Memory
item.description: [Bougainville News] FIVE YEARS ago we farewelled GC Sir Michael Somare with the most deserving tributes around the country. We also paused to remember him as someone whose political life is synonymous with the birth of PNG as a nation state … Continue reading →

item.description: [Education News PNG] From the village of Nanuku on Malo Island, Vanuatu, to the global arena of diplomacy and international affairs, Lorenzo Moli’s academic and professional journey is The post Lorenzo Moli’s Path to Global Affairs first appeared on Education News PNG .

item.title: Cricket PNG Sets Ambitious Goal to Reach 150,000 Youth in 2026
item.description: [Inside PNG] Cricket PNG sets a bold 2026 goal to reach 150,000 youth, aligning regional managers and high-performance plans at the Port Moresby conference. The post Cricket PNG Sets Ambitious Goal to Reach 150,000 Youth in 2026 first appeared on Inside PNG . The post Cricket PNG Sets Ambitious Goal to Reach 150

item.title: PNG Trade Landscape May See Gradual Rise in Chinese Yuan Use
item.description: [One Papua New Guinea] Papua New Guinea’s trade environment could experience a gradual increase in Chinese Yuan transactions, but the United States dollar will remain a crucial settlement currency, Bank of Papua New Guinea Governor Elizabeth Genia says. PNG Trade Landscape May See Gradual Rise in Chinese Yuan Use She stat

item.title: Snakebite Antivenom in PNG
item.description: [Pawa TV] Papua New Guinea faces significant challenges in accessing life-saving antivenom for snakebite treatment, with rural facilities often lacking supplies despite improvements in distribution and partnerships. Access disparities increase health risks. The post Snakebite Antivenom in PNG first appeared o

item.title: PNG Government Boosts Divine Word University with K15m Funding
item.description: [PNG Facts] Papua New Guinea has provided a K15 million funding boost to Divine Word University, aimed at improving campus infrastructure and supporting future enrolment growth. PNG Government Boosts Divine Word University with K15m Funding The funding was presented by Higher Education Minister Kinoka Hotune Fe

item.title: Afrobeat Star Ruger’s PNG Concert scrapped
item.description: [Post Courier] Thousands of Afrobeat fans have been left disappointed following the sudden cancellation of the "Ruger Live in PNG" concert, which was scheduled to take place this Saturday, March 14, 2026. Event ticketing agent Tiket Mastas issued an urgent notice to ticketholders today, confirming that the Nigeria

item.title: Police Give Bus and Taxi Owners One Month to Fix Vehicles
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] BY GINNAH MINI BUS and taxi owners have been given one month to repair their vehicles and update registrations before authorities begin strict enforcement of traffic laws. The NCD/Central Police Division released a media statement earlier last week warning that drivers who commit traffic offences an

item.title: Over 500 attend ITI AI Summit in Port Moresby
item.description: [The PNG Sun] More than 500 participants attended the second Artificial Intelligence (AI) Summit hosted by the International Training Institute (ITI) at the Stanley Hotel in Port Moresby last Friday. The summit highlighted growing interest in artificial intelligence and digital transformation in Papua New Guinea.

item.title: Dei bai-ileksen suruk bek tupela de
item.description: [Wantok Niuspepa] PNGEC i wari long hevi bilong sekyuriti na i surukim bai-ileksen bilong Dei Open i go bek tupela de

item.title: Call on PNG Forest Authority to publish log export data
item.description: [Act Now PNG] ACT NOW! is calling on the PNG Forest Authority to publish the complete log export data for 2024 and 2025.

item.title: Bougainville News Alerts : Simon Pentanu : My memories of Kieta
item.description: [Bougainville News] The first permanent German presence in Kieta, Bougainville, began with the establishment of a Marist mission in 1901, followed by an official German colonial administrative office in 1905 to oversee the region. They would have seen, steaming into the deep natural harbour, … Continue reading →

item.title: Renovation Work Commences at Insect Collection Centre
item.description: [Inside PNG] Renovation begins at the NAIC in Port Moresby. The K210,000 project upgrades storage for 96,000+ insect specimens to boost agricultural research. The post Renovation Work Commences at Insect Collection Centre first appeared on Inside PNG . The post Renovation Work Commences at Insect Collection Cent

item.title: PNG Tourism Policy Reform Targets Sustainable Growth
item.description: [One Papua New Guinea] Papua New Guinea is reforming its tourism industry to position it as an investment-ready sector capable of driving sustainable economic growth. At a legislative review workshop in Port Moresby, PNG Tourism Promotion Authority CEO Eric Mossman Uvovo said the reforms were crucial to unlocking the sect

item.title: Leatherback Turtles in PNG
item.description: [Pawa TV] Papua New Guinea hosts six of the world's seven sea turtle species, including the declining Leatherback turtles. Community conservation efforts and international partnerships aim to protect these endangered species amid ongoing threats. The post Leatherback Turtles in PNG first appeared on PAWA TV .

item.title: PNG Bilums Edge Fiji to Top Group B in Women’s World Cup Qualifiers
item.description: [PNG Facts] Papua New Guinea secured top spot in Group B after edging Fiji 1-0 in their final Round 2 match of the FIFA Women’s World Cup 2027 Oceania Qualifiers at Govind Park. PNG Bilums Edge Fiji to Top Group B in Women’s World Cup Qualifiers / Photo credit: OFC Media via Phototek The narrow victory means PN

item.title: PNG Tribal Foundation clarifies: Not organising Ben Carson visit to PNG
item.description: [Post Courier] PNG Tribal Foundation has clarified that it is not responsible for bringing renowned American neurosurgeon Ben Carson to Papua New Guinea. Foundation President GT Bustin (pictured) made the clarification following media reports claiming that PNG Tribal Foundation was organising Dr Carson’s visit to

item.title: Celebrating World Book Day: St Therese Primary School receives much-needed library books for their students
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] In celebration of World Book Day, Buk bilong Pikinini (BbP) and Fincorp made the donation of 1,000 high quality library books to St Therese Primary School in Port Moresby, National Capital District. The children were excited to help unbox the books and get stuck into reading.The donated books were s

item.title: PNG must build digital foundations to lead AI Economy: Matainaho
item.description: [The PNG Sun] Papua New Guinea must build strong digital infrastructure and policy frameworks if it wants to play a meaningful role in the global artificial intelligence economy, Secretary for the Department of Information and Communications Technology, Steven Matainaho told ai summit last Friday. Delivering the

item.title: PMGH laik ol femili rausim bodi long mog hariap
item.description: [Wantok Niuspepa] Sif Ekseketiv Opisa bilong Pot Mosbi Jeneral Haus Sik, Dokta Paki Molumi i singaut long ol pipel long go sekim mog na rausim dai bodi bilong ol famili na wantok bilong ol hariap, na karim i go planim. Mog i pulap na wanem ol bodi i stap longtaim bai haus sik i bungim olgeta na planim long wanpela bi

item.description: [Act Now PNG] ACT NOW! is calling on the PNG Forest Authority to publish the complete log export data for 2024 and 2025.

item.title: PNG Hunters Fall Short in Trial Against Ipswich Jets in Goroka
item.description: [One Papua New Guinea] Papua New Guinea’s SP PNG Hunters went down 32-24 to the visiting Ipswich Jets in an entertaining trial match played before a large and vocal crowd at the National Sports Institute in Goroka yesterday afternoon. PNG Hunters Fall Short in Trial Against Ipswich Jets in Goroka The PNG side showed resil

item.title: The Origins of Buai
item.description: [Pawa TV] The Betel Nut, or buai, is a culturally significant psychoactive substance in PNG, used in rituals and social events. However, its consumption poses serious health risks and environmental issues, prompting calls for balance. The post The Origins of Buai first appeared on PAWA TV .

item.title: PNG Bougainville President Welcomes Indian Partner for Panguna Redevelopment
item.description: [PNG Facts] The PNG Autonomous Bougainville Government (ABG) has taken another step towards reopening the Panguna Mine by approving Indian company Lloyds Metals and Energy Limited (LMEL) as a partner in the project. Bougainville President Ishmael Toroama, speaking in Port Moresby yesterday, said the government

The event, held at the Crown Hotel on Friday, March 6, broug

item.title: Minister Clarifies DDA Role When Parliamentary Seat Is Vacant
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] THE Minister for Provincial and Local-level Government Affairs, Soroi Eoe, has clarified the legal basis and purpose of administrative measures taken under the District Development Authority Act 2014 when a parliamentary seat becomes vacant. In a press statement issued this afternoon,the Minister sa

item.title: Job seekers urged to state AI literacy in CVs
item.description: [The PNG Sun] Job seekers or fresh graduates have been urged to state their Artificial Intelligence (AI) literacy skills in CVs when applying for jobs so they will have advantage over their job contenders. Ritesh Chugh, Associate Dean at the School of ICT of Central Queensland University in Australia, said the Ar

item.title: Australia pasim tingting bilong PNG wantaim ragbi lig
item.description: [Wantok Niuspepa] Australia i bilip ol i pasim tingting na bel bilong Papaua Niugini pinis taim ol i sapotim PNG long putim wanpela tim insait long NRL. Ol i bilip dispela i pasim PNG na i no wari long ol arapela wokbung PNG i gat wantaim ol arapela kantri olsem China.

item.title: What's in a bilum?: PNG's iconic string bag
item.description: [Act Now PNG] In Papua New Guinea, the bilum is among the most familiar objects of daily life.

item.title: Kuk Agriculture Site
item.description: [Pawa TV] The Kuk Agricultural Site in Papua New Guinea, dating back over 10,000 years, highlights early farming practices and stands as a significant example of agricultural development in the Pacific region. The post Kuk Agriculture Site first appeared on PAWA TV .

item.title: PNG Teaching Service Commission Digitises 53 Years of Teacher Records
item.description: [PNG Facts] Papua New Guinea’s Teaching Service Commission has taken a major step toward modernising teacher administration with the rollout of a digital workforce records system launched in Port Moresby yesterday. The Teacher Workforce File and Qualification Digitization Project replaces the manual filing syst

item.title: 17 candidates enter final LRRU selection phase
item.description: [Post Courier] The elite Long Range Reconnaissance Unit of the Papua New Guinea Defence Force has reached a critical stage in its latest recruitment cycle, with the candidate pool narrowing significantly. Out of an initial group of 48 recruits, only 17 remain on course as the selection process enters its final, mo

item.title: ICCC Announces Increase in Retail Fuel Prices for March 2026
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] THE Independent Consumer and Competition Commission (ICCC) has announced new indicative retail prices (IRP) for petroleum products across Papua New Guinea, effective from 8 March 2026, following increases in global oil prices. According to the regulator, the updated fuel prices reflect several cost

item.title: UN questions PNG Government on SABL leases and illegal FCA logging
item.description: [Act Now PNG] UN is calling for answers from the PNG government over its controversial SABL leases and the use of FCAs as cover for illegal logging operations.

item.title: PNG: Independent Kipa Declared Dei MP After Weeks of Intense Counting
item.description: [One Papua New Guinea] PNG’s Dei Open Electorate now has a new Member of Parliament, with Independent candidate Desmond Paul Kipa officially declared the winner after a closely contested by-election. The declaration followed the final elimination stage where candidate Tui Ekil, who recorded 22,722 votes, was excluded from

item.title: Aid Funding to Papua New Guinea
item.description: [Pawa TV] Foreign assistance is crucial for Papua New Guinea's development, supporting infrastructure and governance. However, challenges such as fund mismanagement and aid dependency threaten sustainability and effectiveness. The post Aid Funding to Papua New Guinea first appeared on PAWA TV .

item.description: [PNG Facts] A renewed push to raise service quality is underway at PNG’s national airline, Air Niugini, following the launch of its Customer Experience Transformation (CXT) Programme during its first 2026 Townhall in Port Moresby. The staff gathering also served as the official welcome for new Chief Executive O

The ceremony was officiated by Magistrate Billy Pidu and witnessed by the Minister for International Trade and Investment Richard Ma

item.description: [The PNG Sun] Acting Managing Director and CEO of the National Airports Corporation, Dominic Kaumu, says upgrade works at Hoskins Airport in West New Britain Province are progressing steadily, with both airside and landside developments now 32 percent complete. Mr. Kaumu said the contractor has already completed

item.description: [Bougainville News] Bougainville Electoral Commissioner, Desmond Tsianai, today formally returned 45 writs comprising the Presidency, 38 single-member constituencies and the six reserved regional seats for women and Former Combatants. Tsianai formally handed the election writs to the outgoing Speaker, Simon Pentanu, of

Team officials announced the final selection of 23 players who will proudly wear the red, black and gold in their quest to

item.title: Understanding Parliamentary Committees in Papua New Guinea
item.description: [Pawa TV] In Papua New Guinea, parliamentary committees enhance oversight, transparency, and public participation by scrutinising government activities, involving MPs, and ensuring independence from the executive, thus fostering democratic accountability. The post Understanding Parliamentary Committees in Pap

item.title: PNG Capital to Host Three-Night Market and Unity Walk for International Women’s Day
item.description: [PNG Facts] Papua New Guinea’s capital will mark International Women’s Day with a three-night market and a unity walk, according to Powes Parkop. The announcement was made during a press conference at Sir Hubert Murray Stadium in Port Moresby yesterday. Governor Parkop said the National Capital District Commiss

item.title: Governor Peter launches smarter safer schools programme at Iobuna-Kouba

item.title: BPNG GOVERNOR PRESENTS THE CENTRAL BANK’S MARCH 2026 OUTLOOK IN THE ECONOMY,INFLATION AND MONETARY POLICY
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] The Governor of the Bank of Papua New Guinea, Ms. Elizabeth Genia, today presented the Bank’s March 2026 Outlook on the Economy, Inflation and Monetary Policy, outlining recent economic developments, the outlook for inflation, and the latest decisions of the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC). Governor

item.title: Brother of slain UPNG law student rejects revenge, calls for justice and peace
item.description: [The PNG Sun] The eldest brother of slain UPNG law student Aitawe Napo has publicly declared that his tribesmen will not retaliate against members of the Yakuman tribe, who were allegedly involved in the killing of his younger sibling on December 31 last year. Aitawe, 29, lost his life following a violent inciden

item.description: [Wantok Niuspepa] Urbanisation in Melanesia is a rapidly growing trend and the changes come with their own challenges.

item.title: Still no decisive ban on round log export
item.description: [Act Now PNG] We are enlightened by the forest canopy, and so we take the announcement by the Papua New Guinea Forest Authority to ban round log exports this year with great unease.

item.title: PNG Centre Max Out for Five Weeks After Injury in London Broncos’ Cup Clash
item.description: [One Papua New Guinea] Papua New Guinea centre Alex Max has been ruled out for five weeks after sustaining a chest injury during the London Broncos’ Challenge Cup defeat to Bradford Bulls in the United Kingdom. The injury setback comes after a bruising encounter that saw the Broncos go down 26-8 in the Third Round match p

item.title: Rural Solar Electrification in PNG
item.description: [Pawa TV] Solar energy is transforming lives in Papua New Guinea, where limited electricity access challenges rural communities. Decentralised solar systems promise a scalable solution, supporting government goals for improved electrification by 2030. The post Rural Solar Electrification in PNG first appeared

item.title: PNG Citizens Told to Avoid Middle East Travel Amid Escalating Conflict
item.description: [PNG Facts] Papua New Guinea nationals have been strongly advised to defer any travel to the Middle East as war spreads across parts of the Gulf and neighbouring Arab states. In a statement released by the Department of Foreign Affairs, Secretary Elias Wohengu described the situation as volatile, warning that a

item.title: Panguna mine Landowners visit Ok Tedi to learn from PNG’s leading National Mine Operation
item.description: [Post Courier] As Papua New Guinea’s leading national mining company, Ok Tedi Mining Limited (Ok Tedi) is committed to strengthening communities through open knowledge sharing, practical learning and the promotion of responsible resource development across the country. This commitment formed the basis of a weeklon

item.title: PNG Tribal Foundation: Not responsible for bringing Ben Carson to PNG
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] PNG Tribal Foundation has clarified that they are not responsible for brining renowned American Neurosurgeon Ben Carson to Papua New Guinea. Foundation President GT Bustin made the clarification following media reports claiming that PNG Tribal Foundation was organizing Dr. Carson’s visit to the coun

item.title: PM Marape launches National Internally Displaced Persons Policy
item.description: [The PNG Sun] Prime Minister, James Marape yesterday launched the National Internally Displaced Persons Policy (NIDPP) 2025–2035. The NIDPP provides the framework for a more coordinated support to displaced Papua New Guineans (IDPs), those who are returning to their land after displacement, and host communities w

item.title: La Nina bai kam - gavman mas redi
item.description: [Wantok Niuspepa] National Weather Service (NWS) bilong PNG i tok 'La Nina' bai kam klostu nau tasol i no gat wanpela toksave i kam long gavman yet long wanem samting ol bai mekim o sapos ol i redi long wanem kain ol hevi dispela taim nogut bai nap long bringim.

item.description: [Act Now PNG] Six organisations have submitted the first formal complaint to the Equator Principles detailing urgent concerns about the potential climate, biodiversity and human rights impacts of the proposed Papua LNG project

Ishmael Toroama, MHR at the Joint Consultation Moderator Meeting Sir Jerry Mateparae, Distinguished Moderator, the Honourable James Marape, Prime Minister of Papua New Guinea, Foreign Missions, distinguished dignitaries, ladies and gentlemen. First I would … C

item.title: USP Professors Elected as new Fellows of the Pacific Academy of Sciences
item.description: [Education News PNG] Professors Bibhya Sharma and Sushil Kumar, distinguished academics from The University of the South Pacific (USP), are among thirteen leading Pacific researchers and innovators elected The post USP Professors Elected as new Fellows of the Pacific Academy of Sciences first appeared on Education News

item.title: Kai Tane Appointed as New CEO of National St John Ambulance
item.description: [Inside PNG] National St John Ambulance Council appoints Kai Tane as Chief Executive. A veteran paramedic and leader, Tane aims to drive service excellence. The post Kai Tane Appointed as New CEO of National St John Ambulance first appeared on Inside PNG . The post Kai Tane Appointed as New CEO of National St Jo

item.title: PNG Police Identify Alleged Officer in Eight Mile Shooting
item.description: [PNG Facts] Police in the National Capital District have identified an alleged police unit believed to be involved in the fatal shooting of a young man at Eight Mile Last Block. Acting Assistant Commissioner of Police NCD/Central, Chief Superintendent Benjamin Turi, confirmed yesterday that both the police vehi

item.title: Head teachers in Konnou trained on Inclusive Education and Disability Support
item.description: [Post Courier] The Inclusive Education Resource Centre (IERC) in Bougainville’s southern region has now entered the Konnou constituency. Just last week, during the Konnou head teacher’s forum, an all-inclusive approach was taken, and every teacher was made aware of the importance of Inclusive education. To access

item.title: Partial Victory for Yafai
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] The Supreme Court has overturned the misappropriation convictions against Jacob Yafai, ruling that the trial judge committed an error when finding Yafai guilty. In a decision handed down this morning, a three-judge bench set aside the guilty verdicts on all four misappropriation charges and entered

item.title: Iran’s supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei confirmed death
item.description: [The PNG Sun] Israel military sources, who are familiar with the operation, have confirmed that Iran’s supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed during their strikes. US President Donald Trump in a Facebook post said: “Khamenei, one of the evilest people in History, is dead. This is not only Justice for th

item.title: Video explainer: The FCA Logging Scandal
item.description: [Act Now PNG] New video explains how FCA's are being abused

item.title: Bougainville News Alerts : Speaker of the House of Representatives Simon Pentanu, has announced the official dates of the 2025 ABG General Election
item.description: [Bougainville News] Speaker of the House of Representatives Simon Pentanu, has announced the official dates of the 2025 ABG General Election Mr Pentanu said that he would be issuing the writs for the 2025 ABG General Election of the Bougainville House of … Continue reading →

item.title: University of Goroka Suspended Indefinitely After Student–Local Violence
item.description: [Education News PNG] GOROKA, Eastern Highlands — The University of Goroka (UOG) has been suspended indefinitely after violent clashes erupted between students and local residents over the weekend, The post University of Goroka Suspended Indefinitely After Student–Local Violence first appeared on Education News PNG .

item.title: Ok Tedi Reports K9.3 Billion Revenue Amid Infrastructure Hurdles
item.description: [Inside PNG] Ok Tedi Mining has reported K9.3 billion in 2025 revenue, delivering a K1 billion dividend to PNG while exceeding copper and gold targets. The post Ok Tedi Reports K9.3 Billion Revenue Amid Infrastructure Hurdles first appeared on Inside PNG . The post Ok Tedi Reports K9.3 Billion Revenue Amid Infra

item.title: PNG Elections Facing Integrity Crisis, Says Sam Koim
item.description: [PNG Facts] Papua New Guinea’s electoral system is facing a deep crisis that threatens the very foundation of democracy, according to former Internal Revenue Commission commissioner Sam Koim. Speaking after contesting the Dei by-election where he finished second, Koim said PNG must urgently address weaknesses i

item.title: Credit Bank sponsors TIPNG
item.description: [Post Courier] Credit Bank PNG values its relationship with Transparency International PNG (TIPNG) and continues it's sponsorship to support TIPNG. At Credit Bank we believe trust is everything. People trust us with their savings, their businesses, their future and that trust only exists when integrity is at the c

item.title: France-New Caledonia governance deal no sure thing
item.description: [The PNG Bulletin] AAP: By Ben McKay in Hobart New Caledonia’s fraught path to a new governance deal with France is no certainty, with significant political challenges ahead. Paris and Noumea have engaged in intense negotiations since deadly and costly riots in May 2024. The Melanesian nation is split on the thorny is

item.title: Fulbright English teaching assistant engage with UPNG students, strengthen academic partnerships
item.description: [The PNG Sun] Fulbright English teaching assistants Jasmine Villavicencio and Kyle Aloof visited the University of Papua New Guinea (UPNG) in Port Moresby this week. They were accompanied by U.S. Embassy official Matilda Kapipi. Related article: https://pg.usembassy.gov/fulbright-teaching-excellence-and-achieveme

item.title: Rio Tinto urged to accelerate action on remediation of Panguna mine
item.description: [Act Now PNG] Rio Tinto urged to accelerate action on remediation of Panguna mine disaster, one year on from investigation

item.title: PNG Media Council Condemns Attack on Female Journalist in Port Moresby
item.description: [PNG Facts] The attack on a female journalist in PNG has drawn widespread condemnation, with police confirming investigations into the conduct of five Correctional Service officers accused of assaulting a reporter at the CS headquarters in Waigani, Port Moresby. The incident happened on Friday morning as she at

item.title: The FCA forest grab explained in pictures
item.description: [Act Now PNG] Seven simple infographics tell the story of the FCA logging scandal

item.title: PNG NICTA Issues LEO Satellite Permits to Boost National Connectivity
item.description: [PNG Facts] The National Information and Communications Technology Authority (NICTA) has moved to strengthen digital access across PNG by granting new test permits for low earth orbit satellite services aimed at improving connectivity nationwide. The regulator said the approvals are part of ongoing efforts by t
